mapper.select:
SELECT p.payment_id AS "paymentId", p.account_id AS "userId", p.reservation_id AS "reservationId", p.original_amount AS "originalAmount", p.discount_amount AS "discountAmount", p.final_amount AS "finalAmount", p.status AS "paymentStatus", TO_CHAR(p.expire_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "expireAt",
rr.trainer_account_id AS "trainerAccountId", rr.product_id AS "productId", rr.pass_id AS "passId", rr.counts AS "counts", rr.status AS "reservationStatus", rr.base_fee_snapshot AS "roomFee", rr.price_snapshot AS "ptFee", rr.total_price_snapshot AS "totalFee", rr.pay_type AS "reservationPayType",
c.center_id AS "centerId", c.center_name AS "centerName", c.center_region AS "centerRegion",
v_trainer.nickname AS "trainerNickname",
TO_CHAR(MIN(rs.start_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "startTime", TO_CHAR(MAX(rs.end_time), 'HH24:MI') AS "endTime"
FROM payment p JOIN room_reservation rr ON p.reservation_id = rr.reservation_id JOIN reservation_slot_connect rsc ON rr.reservation_id = rsc.reservation_id JOIN room_slots rs ON rsc.slot_id = rs.slot_id JOIN rooms r ON rs.room_id = r.room_id JOIN centers c ON r.center_id = c.center_id LEFT JOIN vw_account_display v_trainer ON rr.trainer_account_id = v_trainer.account_id WHERE p.payment_id = #{paymentId} GROUP BY p.payment_id, p.account_id, p.reservation_id, p.original_amount, p.discount_amount, p.final_amount, p.status, p.expire_at, -- TO_CHAR는 GROUP BY에 원본 컬럼 사용 rr.trainer_account_id, rr.product_id, rr.pass_id, rr.counts, rr.status, rr.base_fee_snapshot, rr.price_snapshot, rr.total_price_snapshot, rr.pay_type, c.center_id, c.center_name, c.center_region, v_trainer.nickname
